title: Suggest agent_meta for Marketplace Assets (LLM-Inferred)
summary: Use the SpiderGate-powered marketplace_suggest_agent_meta tool to infer mood / palette / brand_fit_tags / scene_type / agent_meta for a marketplace asset (component, bg-video, site template). Two-step: suggest → review → apply via set_*_agent_meta. Use when uploading a fresh marketplace asset that needs taxonomy.
